text:
The Trinity Elixir (, Sangensui) is the mother solution for all sorts of liquids, located in the South-southeast of the known world in the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 

History

When the Mimbo Republic enlist the help of the Hunter Association, they sent an expedition to the Dark Continent in its search, but were surrounded by Ai. After a still unknown dispute or struggle ensued only three survivors returned, but empty-handed and without even a shred of their sanity. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Ging Freecss narrates each of the expeditions to the Dark Continent, to Beyond Netero's own Expedition Team. He informs them of the consequences of hunting for the Trinity Elixir, in which only three survivors remained from Mimbo Republic's team.
